cards.title: When critical initiatives need strong program leadership
cards.problem: Large initiatives fail when no one owns the full system.
cards.solution: I lead cross-functional programs and ensure critical initiatives deliver the outcomes desired — with all stakeholders along for the ride.

cards.title: When product strategy needs to become engineering reality
cards.problem: Strategy often breaks down between executives, product, and development.
cards.solution: I translate vision into execution so teams can move efficiently in the same direction.

cards.title: When delivery becomes chaotic
cards.problem: Roadmaps stall, priorities conflict, and teams lose engagement.
cards.solution: I create clarity around what matters most and how to execute it fast.
